global.summary: The Cancer Research Society is dedicated to funding innovative cancer research across Canada, supporting scientists and advancing treatments that save lives.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Begin your visit with an overview of the Cancer Research Society experience. This starting view introduces the virtual tour and the spaces where supporters can learn about naming opportunities that fund innovative cancer research across Canada.
facts: The Cancer Research Society funds peer-reviewed cancer research across Canada.
Naming opportunities support breakthrough research and lasting impact.
Donors can explore tax-efficient giving strategies with GIFTABULATOR®.

faqs.q: What does the Cancer Research Society do?
faqs.a: We fund innovative cancer research across Canada, supporting scientists working to improve prevention, detection, and treatment.

faqs.q: How can I contact the Society?
faqs.a: Email mboustani@src-crs.ca, call 514-861-9227 or toll-free 1-888-766-2262, or visit cancerresearchsociety.ca.
625 President-Kennedy Avenue Suite 402, Montreal, QC H3A 3S5.

suggestedQuestions: What does the Cancer Research Society do?
How can I contact the Society?

reception.title: Reception
reception.description: Enter the reception area of the Cancer Research Society virtual tour. This welcome space is where visitors first connect with the Society's mission — and where naming opportunities help fund breakthrough research that improves prevention, detection, and treatment for patients across Canada.
facts: The reception desk is a key naming opportunity location.
Staff welcome visitors and supporters of cancer research.
GIFTABULATOR® can help calculate your tax-efficient giving potential.

faqs.q: What is the reception desk naming opportunity?
faqs.a: The reception desk naming opportunity supports the Cancer Research Society's mission. Contact us for investment details.

faqs.q: How do I go back to the overview?
faqs.a: Use the Overview hotspot or the scene panel to return to the exterior view.

faqs.q: How can I support cancer research?
faqs.a: Explore naming opportunities in the tour or visit cancerresearchsociety.ca to learn about giving options.
